race.comment: THINKINGNINTYNINE (1) doesn't win out of turn but rarely turns in a poor one. Has good early muster and is drawn to advantage with plenty of running in his legs. Expect him to go straight to the front and prove very tough to run down. EXPLICABLE (4) backs up quickly after missing by a long neck here as favourite on Wednesday. Hasn't won for a long time but isn't without his chance again here. FUNNY LEGS (11) had their measure last start at Lock. This is tougher but he draws well and deserves some thought. BONA FIDE STAR (10) disappointed last time when dropping back in grade but backs up quickly and gets in well with the claim. Don't dismiss.
